name: windows-binaries
title: windows-binaries

commands.name: windows-binaries
commands.raw_help:
root@kali:~# windows-binaries -h
 
 > windows-binaries ~ Various pentesting Windows binaries
 
 /usr/share/windows-resources/binaries
 |-- chisel_386.exe -> ../../chisel-common-binaries/chisel_1.11.5_windows_386.exe
 |-- chisel_amd64.exe -> ../../chisel-common-binaries/chisel_1.11.5_windows_amd64.exe
 |-- chisel_arm64.exe -> ../../chisel-common-binaries/chisel_1.11.5_windows_arm64.exe
 |-- enumplus
 |-- exe2bat.exe
 |-- fgdump
 |-- fport
 |-- klogger.exe
 |-- ligolo-ng_agent_amd64.exe -> ../../ligolo-ng-common-binaries/ligolo-ng_agent_0.8.3_windows_amd64.exe
 |-- ligolo-ng_agent_arm64.exe -> ../../ligolo-ng-common-binaries/ligolo-ng_agent_0.8.3_windows_arm64.exe
 |-- ligolo-ng_proxy_amd64.exe -> ../../ligolo-ng-common-binaries/ligolo-ng_proxy_0.8.3_windows_amd64.exe
 |-- ligolo-ng_proxy_arm64.exe -> ../../ligolo-ng-common-binaries/ligolo-ng_proxy_0.8.3_windows_arm64.exe
 |-- mbenum
 |-- nbtenum
 |-- nc.exe
 |-- plink.exe
 |-- radmin.exe
 |-- vncviewer.exe
 |-- wget.exe
 `-- whoami.exe

commands.name: windows-resources
commands.raw_help:
root@kali:~# windows-resources -h
 /usr/share/windows-resources
 |-- binaries
 |-- dbd
 |-- heartleech
 |-- hyperion
 |-- mimikatz
 |-- ncat
 |-- nishang -> ../nishang
 |-- ollydbg
 |-- powercat
 |-- powershell-empire -> ../powershell-empire

 |-- rubeus
 |-- sbd
 |-- secure-socket-funneling
 |-- shellter
 |-- sqldict
 |-- tftpd32
 |-- wce
 `-- windows-privesc-check

binary_metadata.file_type: a sh script, ASCII text executable

apt_metadata.description:
Various pentesting Windows binaries
A collection of Windows executables for use on penetration tests.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use windows-binaries because ### windows-binaries.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair windows-binaries with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `windows-binaries --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: ### windows-binaries.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install windows-binaries
